team.name: Ella Zhang
team.bio: Ella founded Inpetto after 7 years leading brand and content strategy at agencies across Sydney and Melbourne. She's obsessed with the intersection of creativity and culture.

team.name: James Moretti
team.bio: James leads strategy across all client accounts. With a background in digital marketing at a Big 4 consulting firm, he brings rigour and creativity in equal measure.

team.name: Priya Sharma
team.bio: Priya manages paid social across Meta and TikTok for Inpetto's clients. She's overseen $2M+ in ad spend and has a talent for finding the creative angles that convert.

team.name: Luca Fitzgerald
team.bio: Luca leads content production at Inpetto — overseeing video, photography, and design. He's worked with brands from streetwear startups to ASX-listed companies.

team.name: Sofia Nakamura
team.bio: Sofia manages Inpetto's influencer relationships and campaigns. She's built partnerships with 500+ creators across lifestyle, fashion, beauty, and food verticals.

team.name: Omar Al-Rashid
team.bio: Omar turns data into decisions. He builds reporting dashboards, tracks growth metrics, and ensures every strategy is grounded in real insights — not guesswork.
